source: DMG NPC class + Ptolus chaos cult

dominate (30 ft., Will DC 17 or dominated for 1 day/HD)
energy drain (2 negative levels, Fort DC 15 to remove after 24 hrs)

name: Aboleth
special_attacks: psionics (hypnotic pattern, illusory wall, mirage arcana, persistent image, programmed image, project image, veil)
slime (contact, Fort DC 19 or skin becomes transparent, aquatic dependency, takes 1d12 damage per hour out of water)
special_qualities: mucus cloud (any creature adjacent must Fort DC 19 or infected with slime)
organization: Solitary, brood (2-4), or slaver brood (1-2 plus 7-12 skum)

name: Carrion Crawler
special_attacks: paralysis (Fort DC 13, 2d6 rounds, paralyzed on any failed save)

name: Gibbering Mouther
special_attacks: gibbering (60 ft., Will DC 13 or confused 1d2 rounds)
ground manipulation (stone softens to mud in 5-ft. radius; reduced movement)
spittle (10 ft., ranged touch +4, target must Fort DC 13 or blinded)

name: Beholder

attacks.full_attack: Eye rays +8 ranged touch and bite +9 (2d4)

special_attacks: eye rays (central eye: antimagic cone 150 ft.; 10 small eyes: charm person DC 17, charm monster DC 19, sleep DC 17, telekinesis 250 lb., flesh to stone DC 19, disintegrate DC 19, fear DC 19, slow DC 17, inflict moderate wounds DC 17, death ray Fort DC 19; each ray 150 ft. range; up to 5 rays per round vs different targets)
special_qualities: antimagic cone (central eye: 150 ft., suppresses magic)

name: Mimic
special_attacks: adhesive (stuck until Str DC 16 free; acid dissolves or fire clears)
special_qualities: mimic shape (disguise as any object of same size)

name: Rust Monster
special_attacks: rust (touch destroys metal; magic items Fort DC 17 negates per item)

name: Darkmantle
special_attacks: darkness (constant; 5-ft. radius magical darkness; deactivate as free action)

name: Violet Fungus
special_attacks: poison (Fort DC 14; primary 1d4 Str, secondary 1d4 Con)
organization: Solitary, patch (2-4), or mixed (1-3 with 1d3 shriekers)

name: Gray Ooze

attacks.melee: Slam +2 (1d6 plus 1d6 acid plus metal corrosion)
attacks.full_attack: Slam +2 (1d6 plus 1d6 acid plus metal corrosion)

special_attacks: acid (dissolves metal; magic items Fort DC 16 negates)

name: Ochre Jelly
special_qualities: split (electricity or slashing divides into 2 Medium jellies each with ½ hp)

name: Rat Swarm
special_attacks: distraction (Fort DC 12 or nauseated for 1 round each time swarm damages)
special_qualities: half damage from slashing and piercing

name: Bat Swarm
special_attacks: wounding (any creature damaged by swarm continues to bleed for 1 hp/round for next 4 rounds)

name: Shrieker (Fungus)
special_attacks: shriek (100-ft. alarm; 1/round for 4 rounds; reaction to light 10+ ft. or movement within 10 ft.)
organization: Solitary, patch (3-7), or mixed (2-5 shriekers plus 1-3 violet fungi)

name: Lemure (Devil)
organization: Solitary, pair, gang (3-5), horde (6-15), or mob (16-40)

unnerving gaze (30 ft., Will DC 14 or shaken for 1d4 rounds)

name: Erinyes (Devil)
special_attacks: entangle (rope; grapple +15 when entangled; can be broken Str DC 26)
spell-like abilities (charm monster, minor image, greater teleport, true seeing, unholy blight)

name: Bone Devil (Osyluth)

attacks.full_attack: 2 claws +14 (1d8+5) and bite +12 (2d4+2) and sting +12 (3d4+2 plus poison)

poison (sting; Fort DC 18; primary 1d6 Str, secondary 2d6 Str)
spell-like abilities (dimensional anchor, greater teleport, invisibility, wall of ice)

name: Succubus (Demon)
special_attacks: energy drain (kiss; Fort DC 18 or 1 negative level)
spell-like abilities (charm monster DC 22, detect thoughts DC 16, ethereal jaunt, greater teleport, suggestion DC 17, vampiric touch)
special_qualities: alternate form (any Medium or Small humanoid)

name: Quasit (Demon)
special_attacks: poison (Fort DC 13; primary 1d4 Dex; secondary 2d4 Dex)
spell-like abilities (detect good, detect magic, cause fear, invisibility, commune, 1/week)
special_qualities: alternate form (bat, centipede, toad, or wolf)

name: Hezrou (Demon)
special_attacks: spell-like abilities (chaos hammer, greater teleport, unholy blight, blasphemy, gaseous form)

name: Psicrystal
special_qualities: personality (skill bonus varies by personality chosen)
share powers (manifester's personal powers can target psicrystal)

name: Intellect Devourer
special_attacks: Body thief (full-round action; inhabits/animates a helpless/dead Small+ creature, consuming its brain; can exit as standard action bursting skull)
Psi-like abilities: at will—cloud mind (DC 14), compression, ego whip (1d4, DC 14), id insinuation (DC 14), painful strike; 3/day—body adjustment (1d12), psionic suggestion (DC 14 ML 5th)
languages: Understands Common; must inhabit body to speak

name: Cerebrilith
special_attacks: Psi-like abilities: at will—brain lock (DC 17), detect psionics, ego whip (2d4 DC 19), id insinuation (4 targets DC 20), mind trap (5 rounds); 3/day—psionic dominate (24 hrs DC 20), ectoplasmic form, mind probe (DC 20); 1/day—mind thrust (9d10 DC 20). ML 9th
Spell-like abilities: at will—deeper darkness, desecrate, detect good, dispel good (DC 20), greater teleport (self only), magic circle against good, unholy blight (DC 19). CL 9th
special_qualities: +8 racial bonus on Listen and Spot

name: Brain Mole
special_attacks: Cascade flu (disease—bite; Fort DC 9; 1-day incubation; effect: psionic cascade each time power manifested, DC 16 Concentration or cascade triggers)
Psi-like abilities: at will—detect psionics, power leech (ML 5th DC 14); 3/day—aversion (DC 12), mind thrust (DC 11). ML 1st, save DCs Cha-based
special_qualities: Hide mind (cannot be detected as psionic by divination/clairsentience)
Power conversion (when it drains a PP via power leech, heals 1 hp or gains 24-hr sustenance)

name: Thought Eater
special_attacks: Eat thoughts (melee touch; target loses 1d4 PP; if no PP remain, target loses 1d4 Int; on 0 Int target comatose until Int restored)
Psi-like abilities: at will—detect psionics; 3/day—brain lock (DC 13). ML 5th, save DCs Cha-based
special_qualities: Ethereal jaunt (at will as standard action, enter Ethereal Plane; emerges to feed then retreats)

name: Astral Construct I
special_qualities: one ability from Menu A (manifester's choice at creation)

name: Atropal Scion
special_attacks: Death gaze (Fort DC 19 or die; humanoids rise as wights 24 hrs later)
Negative energy aura 60 ft. (undead gain +4 turn resistance and fast healing 5; living take 2 negative levels; creatures 2 HD or less die)
Spell-like abilities (3/day—animate dead, create undead, cone of cold DC 18, desecrate, dispel magic, invisibility, plane shift, speak with dead, teleport; CL 9)
special_qualities: Unholy grace (Cha bonus to saves and deflection AC)

name: Bleakborn
special_attacks: Cold to the touch (2d6 cold on slam; attacker takes 1d6 cold in melee)
Heat-draining aura 30 ft. (Fort DC 16 or 2d6 cold/round; success = 1d6/round)
Create spawn (humanoids slain by aura rise as bleakborn spawn or zombies)
special_qualities: Contingent healing (heals only when living creatures in aura range)

name: Bloodmote Cloud
special_attacks: Blood drain (1d3 damage + 1d2 Con damage to any creature in its space at end of move)
organization: Solitary, cloud (2–4 swarms), or infestation (7–12 swarms)

name: Brain in a Jar
special_attacks: Mind thrust (2d10 psychic damage, Will DC 14)
Psionics (3/day—suggestion DC 16, telekinesis DC 18; 1/day—dominate person DC 18; CL 10)
special_qualities: Madness (1d4 Wis damage to anyone making telepathic contact)

name: Cinderspawn
special_attacks: Charisma drain (Fort DC 18 or 1d6 Cha drain; cinderspawn gains 5 temp hp per drain; fire subtype takes –4 penalty)
special_qualities: Elemental turning vulnerability (+2 to turn if cleric also turns fire)

name: Crypt Chanter
special_attacks: Draining melody 60 ft. (Will DC 18 or dazed; fail again = enthralled; enthralled take 1d2 negative levels/round; creature reaching HD negative levels dies and becomes spawn)
Create spawn (humanoids slain by draining melody become crypt chanters)

name: Deathlock
special_attacks: Spell-like abilities (at will—detect magic, inflict minor wounds DC 13, read magic; 3/day—cause fear DC 13, magic missile, summon monster I; 2/day—death knell DC 14, ghoul glyph DC 14; CL = HD)

name: Entomber
special_attacks: Entomb (Reflex DC 16 or pounded into ground; victim suffocates; must make grapple checks vs. 20 to escape)
Exhume (standard action; raises buried corpse up to 10 ft. deep)

name: Entropic Reaper
special_attacks: Entropic blade (scythe crits deal 2d6 extra negative energy and 1 negative level; Fort DC 19 to avoid level loss)
special_qualities: Master of the scythe (no penalty on scythe attacks)

name: Forsaken Shell
special_attacks: Soul drain (Fort DC 15 or 1d4 Cha damage; if Cha reaches 0 target dies and spirit is trapped in shell)
Trapped soul (can release or use trapped soul to restore own hp)

name: Gravetouched Ghoul

ac.notes: Template: base creature +2 natural armor added as ghoul undead

attacks.melee: Bite + 2 claws (as base creature or ghoul standard)

special_attacks: Paralysis (Fort DC 10+½HD+Cha or paralyzed 1d4+1 rounds; elves immune)
Create spawn (humanoids paralyzed and killed by gravetouched rise as standard ghouls)
special_qualities: Ghoul fever (disease—Fort DC; incubation 1 day; 1d3 Con/1d3 Dex)

name: Hulking Corpse
special_attacks: Stench cloud 10 ft. (Fort DC 17 or sickened for 1d6+4 minutes)
Burst (once/day as standard action; 15 ft. radius explosion of putrid innards; 8d6 damage + sickened; Reflex DC 17 half)

name: Slaughter Wight
special_attacks: Energy drain (2 negative levels on slam; Fort DC 20 24 hrs later to avoid permanent loss)
Create spawn (humanoids drained to 0 hp rise as wights in 1d4 rounds under slaughter wight's control)

name: Skulking Cyst
special_attacks: Attach (latches on; AC drops to 15 while attached)
Blood drain (1d4 Con/round while attached; after 7 Con drained uses necrotic cyst then flees)

name: Spectral Lyrist
special_attacks: Charisma drain (1d6 Cha on touch; Fort DC 15 negates; lyrist gains 5 temp hp per drain)
special_qualities: Alter appearance (can look like any Medium humanoid)

name: Visage
special_attacks: Assume identity (takes form of any creature slain in last round; +20 Bluff/Disguise to pass as victim; lasts 24 hrs)
Create spawn (evil outsiders slain become visages)
Lucidity control (major image visible only to one target; Will DC 21 disbelief)
special_qualities: Positive immunity (immune to positive energy damage)

name: Voidwraith
special_attacks: Steal breath (Fort DC 15 or 1d2 Con drain; air subtype –4 penalty; if holding breath, reduces remaining rounds by 2 per Con drained)
special_qualities: Airless aura (adjacent creatures cannot breathe; must hold breath)
Elemental turning vulnerability (+2 to turn if cleric also turns air)

name: Wheep

attacks.full_attack: 2 claws +16 (1d8+11 plus poison tears) and bite +13 (1d6+5 plus poison tears)

special_attacks: Poison tears (injury; Fort DC 19; 1d6 Con initial and secondary)
Weeping dirge (Will DC 19 or shaken for encounter; sonic effect)
special_qualities: Unholy grace (Cha to saves and deflection AC)

name: Angel of Decay

attacks.full_attack: 2 claws +21 (2d6+18) plus 2 wing slams +16 (1d6+11) plus rotting touch

special_attacks: Rotting aura 15 ft. (Reflex DC 24 or 5d6 damage/round; heals angel 5 hp/victim; Will DC 24 or nauseated 1 round)
Rotting touch (hits with 2+ attacks in round: extra 1d6+6 damage; heals angel 5 hp)

name: Blood Amniote
special_attacks: Blood call (on slam: 1d4 Con damage; if total Con damage equals amniote's max hp it self-spawns into two amniotes)
special_qualities: Ooze traits (mindless; immune to flanking, crits, mind effects)

name: Adult Blue Dragon

attacks.full_attack: Bite +32 (2d8+9) and 2 claws +30 (2d6+4) and 2 wings +30 (1d8+4) and tail slap +30 (2d6+13)

special_attacks: Breath weapon (100-ft. line, 12d8 electricity, Ref DC 27 half)

name: Nalfeshnee
organization: Solitary or troupe (1 plus 2-5 lesser demons)

attacks.full_attack: Spiked chain +24/+19/+14 (2d6+9 plus stun) and bite +21 (1d8+4) and tail +21 (1d8+4 plus infernal wound)
6 longswords +25/+20/+15/+10 (2d6+9) and tail slap +20 (4d6+4 plus constrict)

name: Old Red Dragon

attacks.full_attack: Bite +43 (4d6+15) and 2 claws +41 (2d8+7) and 2 wings +41 (2d6+7) and tail slap +41 (2d8+22)

special_attacks: Breath weapon (60-ft. cone, 18d10 fire, Ref DC 33 half)

name: Ancient Black Dragon

attacks.full_attack: Bite +42 (4d6+13) and 2 claws +40 (2d8+6) and 2 wings +40 (2d6+6) and tail slap +40 (2d8+19)

special_attacks: Breath weapon (120-ft. line, 22d4 acid, Ref DC 32 half)

name: Balor

attacks.full_attack: +1 vorpal longsword +33/+28/+23/+18 (2d6+14) and +1 flaming whip +33 (1d4+13 plus 1d6 fire and entangle)

special_attacks: Death throes (100-ft. burst, 100 dmg, Ref DC 30 half)
organization: Solitary or troupe (1 plus 2-5 lesser demons)

attacks.full_attack: 2 claws +27 (2d8+9) and 2 wings +25 (2d6+4) and bite +25 (4d6+4 plus poison and disease) and tail +25 (2d8+4)

name: Rhodintor
treasure: Standard plus +1 battleaxe and +1 heavy steel shield
description: Earthbound demons created by the Galchutt to ensure the Night of Dissolution comes to pass. Ram-horned, backward-legged arcanists; the Kravren path enhances the body, the Sarycal path favors spells.

name: Shaadom
description: A Chaos Lord of the Galchutt: the consummate chaos mage, an arachnoid-headed floating horror that weaves disorder into its spells. Found in the Caverns of the Galchutt and the Dark Reliquary.

name: Skulk
description: The ignored and disenfranchised who literally faded into the shadows. An aura makes others unable to focus on them (affects even mindless undead). No Ptolus skulk has fewer than 3 rogue levels.

name: Wintersouled
description: Oldest of all undead; the first spirits to cross the veil. They built the Dark Reliquary and created the Forsaken. All known Wintersouled sleep beneath the Reliquary, awaiting the Galchutt's rise.

name: Zaug

attacks.full_attack: 2 claws +18 (1d8+7 plus disease) and bite +13 (2d6+3 plus disease)

description: Least of the Galchutt (save the Elder Brood): a seething mound of plague and corruption covered in wounds that never heal. The 'god' of the lost Shrine of the Despoiler.

name: Ochremeshk (Demon Prince)

attacks.melee: Greatsword +25 (3d6+14 plus 2d6 unholy) or slam +23 (1d6+8 plus touch of fear)
attacks.full_attack: Greatsword +25/+20/+15 (3d6+14 plus 2d6 unholy) or 2 slams +23 (1d6+8 plus touch of fear)

organization: Solitary, or with followers (12 balors and 14 mariliths)
description: A unique demon prince: a wingless, flame-sheathed balor who clawed near the top of the Abyss. Trapped in a cruciform prison beneath the Dark Reliquary; if freed he would seize Goth Gulgamel and Ghul's old domain.

name: Ratling (Ptolus)
organization: Pack (3-6), fester (7-12 plus 1 ratlord), or nest (13-24 plus ratlords, ratbrute, and 3-6 dire rats)
description: The smallest and most common ratmen — degenerate, chaos-aligned rat-folk of the sewers and undercity. Most ratmen are ratlings.

name: Ratlord (Ptolus)

attacks.full_attack: Longsword +4 (1d8) and bite -2 (1d6 plus disease); or dragon pistol +4 ranged (1d12)

organization: Pair, fester (1 plus 7-12 ratlings), or nest
description: Human-sized ratmen — the leaders of packs and festers. A few wield stolen firearms such as the dragon pistol.

name: Ratbrute (Ptolus)
description: The rarest and largest ratmen, ogre-sized brutes that anchor a warren's defense. Some claim they are simply the oldest ratmen, never having stopped growing.

name: D'stradi Abductor

attacks.full_attack: Bloodblade +12/+7 (1d10+7) and bite +6 (1d6+2); or 2 claws +11 (1d6+4) and bite +6 (1d6+2)

description: A D'stradi demon of the Dark Reliquary. Teleports in, grabs a victim, and teleports away; fights with a blood-powered wounding bastard sword called a bloodblade.

name: D'stradi Dancer
description: A D'stradi demon that leaps into battle performing horrid, chaotic magical dances (battle, ruin, speed, shielding, warding) to buff allies or blast foes. Linked to the dwarven concept of madness.

name: D'stradi Annihilator

attacks.melee: Claw +18 (2d6+6 plus poison) or bite +18 (2d8+3 plus poison)
attacks.full_attack: 2 claws +18 (2d6+6 plus poison) and bite +16 (2d8+3 plus poison)

description: The largest D'stradi demon — a poison-clawed brute that vomits energy-draining bile and summons more of its kind. The shock-troops of the Fallen at the Dark Reliquary.

name: Blessed Child (Balsam)
description: One of the Blessed Children — good guardian spirits ('unborn spirit' quality) with turn resistance, set against the undead of Ptolus.

name: Blessed Child (Dayod)
description: One of the Blessed Children — good guardian spirits ('unborn spirit' quality) with turn resistance, set against the undead of Ptolus.

name: Blessed Child (Fealom)
description: One of the Blessed Children — good guardian spirits ('unborn spirit' quality) with turn resistance, set against the undead of Ptolus.

name: Blessed Child (Hallas)
description: One of the Blessed Children — good guardian spirits ('unborn spirit' quality) with turn resistance, set against the undead of Ptolus.
